title: select_with_fee: 2-pass convergence fails when pass-2 selects more notes than pass-1
description: Amount=40000, notes=[20000,20000,10000,10000]: pass1 selects 3 notes at fee=10000 (need=50000), then fee2=15000, pass2 selects 4 notes at fee2=15000 (need=55000). Returns (4 notes, fee=15000). Builder computes zip317_fee(max(4,2))=20000 and checks 60000≠40000+5000+20000=65000 → builder error. The user has enough ZEC but gets a confusing BuilderError instead of a clean send.
close_reason: select_with_fee replaced 2-pass with convergence loop; fee re-computed from actual selected.len() each iteration until stable
